data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_1939C5: This is where we DRAGON users do our\ntraining.\pThe CHAMPION even visits.\nNow do you see how special it is here?
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193A35: Urgh!\nI didn't expect you to be so strong!
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193A60: The road ahead remains long and harsh.\pWhen will my POKéMON and I become the\nbest?
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193AB3: Since we met, we have trained hard\nwith our sights on number one.\pHelp us see how much stronger we've\nbecome!
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193B21: Urgh!\nI didn't expect you to be so strong!
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193B4C: You've obviously kept up your\nPOKéMON training.\pSo long as you remain strong, I, too,\ncan become stronger!
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193BB7: JOHN: We've always battled POKéMON\ntogether as a twosome.\lWe've confidence in ourselves.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193C10: JOHN: Oh, my.\nWe've lost, dear wife.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193C35: JOHN: We've been married for\nfifty years.\pCome to think of it, I've yet to beat\nmy dear wife in a battle.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193C9F: JOHN: Well, well, what a young TRAINER!\pWill you battle with us? If so, you'll\nhave to return with more POKéMON.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193D10: JAY: We've been married for\nfifty years.\pThe bond we share as a couple could\nnever be broken.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193D6E: JAY: Oh, dear.\nWe've lost, my dear husband.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193D9A: JAY: Fifty years of marriage...\pIf we ever argued, we always settled\nit with a POKéMON battle...
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193DFB: JAY: Well, well, aren't you a young\nTRAINER?\pIf you'd care to battle with us, you'll\nhave to come back with more POKéMON.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193E75: JOHN: We've always battled POKéMON\ntogether as a twosome.\lWe've confidence in ourselves.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193ECE: JOHN: Oh, my.\nWe've lost, dear wife.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193EF3: JOHN: Married for fifty years...\pOn reflection, the dear wife and I,\nwe battled day in and day out...
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193F59: JOHN: Well, well, what a young\nTRAINER!\pWill you battle with us? If so, you'll\nhave to return with more POKéMON.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193FCA: JAY: We've been married for\nfifty years.\pWe've supported each other all that\ntime. We've made ourselves strong.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_19403A: JAY: Oh, dear.\nWe've lost, my dear husband.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_194066: JAY: Fifty years of marriage...\nMany things have happened.\pI hope that we will continue to make\nhappy memories together.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_1940DF: JAY: Well, well, aren't you a young\nTRAINER?\pIf you'd care to battle with us, you'll\nhave to come back with more POKéMON.
